title: First screen, Close button
scenario: Onboarding first screen Close button returns user to start screen instead of exiting onboarding flow
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the Home screen, tap the 'Add Device' or 'Supported Devices' option to begin onboarding.
3. On the first onboarding screen, locate and tap the Close button (X) in the upper right corner.
expected: The user is returned to the original start screen (Home screen or Supported Devices screen).
